title: The vivid solid disc is the complete Precept governed domain — bounded, closed, total. The ruled inspection slot bisecting it is not a flaw but a structural feature: at any state, at any time, nothing inside is hidden. Prevention and inspectability are both built into the form.
conceptualBridge: The vivid domain circle means Precept is both a closed domain and a fully transparent one because the disc bounds every valid state while the inspection slot makes the interior always visible.
decision: Removed: avg 3.9 below threshold; monochrome test score 2 and weak conceptual bridge mean it cannot clear the rubric bar.
